title: Add Br0ski777 API Factory to ecosystem
description:
## Summary
- Adds **Br0ski777 API Factory** to the x402 ecosystem directory under Services/Endpoints
- 100 production x402 APIs for AI agents covering crypto/DeFi, Hyperliquid (7 APIs), prediction markets, B2B enrichment, SEO, NLP, and utilities
- All APIs priced at $0.001-$0.02/call in USDC on Base
- Wallet: `0x6E8B64638b24C6D625b045dD353120d850064E2E`
- x402scan profile: https://www.x402scan.com/recipient/0x6E8B64638b24C6D625b045dD353120d850064E2E
- GitHub: https://github.com/Br0ski777

## Cha

title: feat(ecosystem): add Checkpoint402 and Thesis402
description:
- Checkpoint402: Adversarial AI output verification service ($0.01 USDC/call)
- Thesis402: Investment thesis stress-tester ($0.02 USDC/call)

Both services run on Base via x402 protocol.

Note: We require commit signing.

_raw_body:
- Checkpoint402: Adversarial AI output verification service ($0.01 USDC/call)
- Thesis402: Investment thesis stress-tester ($0.02 USDC/call)

Both services run on Base via x402 protocol.

<!--
Thanks for contributing to x402!
Please fill out the information below to help reviewers understand your changes.

Note: We require commit signing.
See here for instructions: https://docs.github.com/en/authentication/managing-commit-signature-verification/about-commit-signature-verification
-->

## Description
  Add two new ecosystem partners:

  - **Checkpoint402**: Adversarial AI output verification service. Agents send output + original task, get back trust score (0-100), hallucination
  detection, logic gap analysis, and fix suggestions. $0.01 USDC per call on Base via x402.
  - **Thesis402**: Investment thesis stress-tester for trading bots and agents. Send any thesis, get conviction score, bear/bull case, blind spots, risk
  analysis, and kill conditions. $0.02 USDC per call on Base via x402.

  Both services are live on Base mainnet and registered on x402scan.

## Tests
 N/A - metadata-only addition (JSON files in partners-data directory)

## Checklist

  - [x] I have formatted and linted my code
  - [x] All new and existing tests pass
  - [ ] My commits are signed
  - [x] I added a changelog fragment for user-facing changes (ecosystem data only, skip)

<!--
Changelog fragments (required for user-facing changes):

- TypeScript: add a Changesets file under `typescript/.changeset/*.md`
  - Create: `pnpm -C typescript changeset`
  - Select only publishable `@x402/*` packages
- Go: add a Changie fragment under `go/.changes/unreleased/*`
  - Create: `make -C go changelog-new`
- Python (python/x402 v2): add a Towncrier fragment under `python/x402/changelog.d/<PR>.<type>.md`
  - Create: `cd python/x402 && uv run towncrier create --content "Fixed ..." 123.bugfix.md`
-->

<!--
For TypeScript: Run `pnpm format && pnpm lint` from `/typescript` and/or `/examples/typescript`
For Python: Run `uvx ruff format && uvx ruff check` from the `python/x402/` directory
For Go: Run `go fmt ./...` and `go vet ./...` from the `/go` directory
-->

title: Add KR Crypto Intelligence to ecosystem (Services/Endpoints)
description:
## Description

Add KR Crypto Intelligence to the x402 ecosystem directory under Services/Endpoints.

Korean crypto market data + AI-powered analysis for AI agents, paid via x402 (CDP facilitator, Base + Solana USDC). 7 endpoints including AI market read ($0.10) with 9 data sources + Claude AI interpretation.

- MCP: https://mcp.printmoneylab.com/mcp
- Source: https://github.com/bakyang2/kr-crypto-intelligence
- Already listed on awesome-x402 (merge
_raw_body:
## Description

Add KR Crypto Intelligence to the x402 ecosystem directory under Services/Endpoints.

Korean crypto market data + AI-powered analysis for AI agents, paid via x402 (CDP facilitator, Base + Solana USDC). 7 endpoints including AI market read ($0.10) with 9 data sources + Claude AI interpretation.

- Live: https://api.printmoneylab.com
- MCP: https://mcp.printmoneylab.com/mcp
- Source: https://github.com/bakyang2/kr-crypto-intelligence
- Already listed on awesome-x402 (merged PR #179)

## Tests

N/A — ecosystem metadata addition only (metadata.json)

## Checklist
- [x] I have formatted and linted my code
- [ ] All new and existing tests pass
- [ ] My commits are signed (required for merge)
- [ ] I added a changelog fragment for user-facing changes (docs-only changes can skip)
